fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: schema_config
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: required_input_fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Name of the row field whose value is the absolute URL to fetch. Values MUST include an explicit 'http://' or 'https://' scheme; bare hostnames (e.g. 'www.example.gov.au') are rejected at fetch time by the SSRF guard. If the upstream source emits scheme-less values, normalize them in the source data or add an upstream value_transform that prepends 'https://' before this transform.
fields.label: url_field
fields.name: url_field

fields.description: Separator inserted between DOM text nodes when format is text.
fields.label: text_separator
fields.name: text_separator
